name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-30
title: Wave-2 deferred: one-shot retirement test consolidation + test-bug-fixes-cycle moot stripping + tombstone invariant renumber
description:
Deferred from wave-1 housekeeping (CONTRACT-BACKLOG-29 scope was already large).

Three related structural cleanups. Could be one cycle or split.

(F6) Three regression tests are one-shot 'this-file-stays-deleted' asserts:
  - test-dead-relink-tests-deleted.py (72 LOC, asserts test-relink*.py absent)
  - test-backlog-27-retirements.py (137 LOC, asserts 4 deleted scripts + 2 dirs + 2 lib symbols absent)
  - test-bug-41-cleanup.py (152 LOC, asserts CheckResult is @dataclass + 3 other shape facts)
Total 360 LOC for facts that can only regress via deliberate revival. Each is also covered by other tests (test-no-dead-contract-scripts.py covers script-absence axis; import-time failures cover dataclass shape).

Resolution: consolidate into one slim 'retired-artifacts-stay-retired.py' that asserts the union of paths, OR delete outright. Prefer consolidation (preserves the regression guard intent in one file).

(F7) test-bug-fixes-cycle.py is 248 LOC, docstring lines 5-21 enumerate BUG-11..BACKLOG-16, lines 60-61 + 211-220 mark 5 entries as 'moot, deleted' (test body just skips them). Live assertions are each duplicated by per-concern tests (test-feature-schema-permissive, test-build-contract*, etc.).

Resolution: either retire the file (live assertions duplicated elsewhere — verify per-assertion before deleting), or strip the moot entries leaving only the unique assertions. Per Designed Deprecation, a grab-bag regression-dump should not grow indefinitely.

(F8) spec.md has ~9 'removed in CONTRACT-BACKLOG-X' tombstone invariants (Inv 2, 6, 8, 14, 27, 29, 31 + parenthetical strikes in 7, 38). With 44 numbered invariants total, ~20% of the list is bookkeeping that re-asserts nothing.

Resolution: per Designed Deprecation, once deletion is locked in by regression test (Inv 41 covers script dead-code; test-backlog-27-retirements.py covers path absence), the tombstone slot stops being load-bearing. Renumber the invariant list monotonically + move tombstone log to a new contract/CHANGELOG.md section.

Acceptance: 360 LOC of one-shot tests consolidated or deleted; test-bug-fixes-cycle.py simplified or retired; spec.md invariants renumbered monotonically; CHANGELOG.md captures retired-invariant audit trail.

history.note: Reopening to re-close with F8-split explanatory reason per wave-2 orchestration.

F6 test consolidation + F7 moot stripping + folded enforcement test + tombstone migration to CHANGELOG complete. Full F8 monotonic renumber + cross-reference audit split to CONTRACT-BACKLOG-31 due to blast radius; tombstones already moved out of spec.md in this cycle so the renumber cycle starts from a cleaner baseline.
